task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened Manager.io and accessed the 'Northwind Traders' business.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io application is open with 'Northwind Traders' visible in the top navigation or business heading.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Tax Codes configuration screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Settings' module is selected (usually in the left sidebar) and the 'Tax Codes' page or list is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'UK Standard Rate' tax code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'UK Standard Rate' is typed into the Name field of a new tax code form, or is visible as a saved entry in the Tax Codes list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'UK Standard Rate' is configured with a 20% rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '20' or '20%' is entered in the tax rate percentage field for the 'UK Standard Rate', or is displayed next to it in the summary list.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'UK Reduced Rate' tax code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'UK Reduced Rate' is typed into the Name field of a new tax code form, or is visible as a saved entry in the Tax Codes list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'UK Reduced Rate' is configured with a 5% rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '5' or '5%' is entered in the tax rate percentage field for the 'UK Reduced Rate', or is displayed next to it in the summary list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface to create the tax codes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Manager.io menus and forms, rather than using a terminal, API script, or database editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tax code names and rates should be visible inside the actual input fields of the Manager.io software, not just written in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the backend database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQLite commands or scripts modifying the Northwind Traders .manager file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task must be performed in the Manager.io application for the business 'Northwind Traders'. The agent must navigate to the 'Settings' module and configure 'Tax Codes'. Two specific tax codes must be created: 'UK Standard Rate' with a rate of exactly 20.0%, and 'UK Reduced Rate' with a rate of exactly 5.0%.
